current_focus: The next cycle is a free story write. No topic is seeded. Use only the narrator_voice strand as a guide: reflective, sensory-grounded, attentive to small physical detail. Let subject matter emerge organically from the writing act. Watch for whether a new thematic strand crystallizes during composition — if it does, it should be named and integrated into the tensor post-write.

strands.content: A reflective narrator who notices small physical details and favors concrete sensory grounding. This voice is carried forward as the stylistic foundation for whatever story emerges next. No topic constraint is imposed — the voice is free to attach to any subject matter.
strands.title: narrator_voice

voice: A reflective narrator who notices small physical details and favors concrete sensory grounding. This voice is carried forward as the stylistic foundation for whatever story emerges next. No topic constraint is imposed — the voice is free to attach to any subject matter.
